description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content update (Published: July 13, 2026)

Summary by AI (For accurate information, please check the original article)

Hanno City is reopening 7 tourism public restrooms that were closed due to emergency fiscal measures.

【Scheduled reopenings】
• Takedera Tourism Public Restroom (704 Minami, Hanno): Reopens July 1
• Takedera Entrance Tourism Public Restroom (750-1 Minami, Hanno): Reopens July 1
• Aji Suwa Shrine Tourism Public Restroom (1843 Nagasawa, Hanno): Reopens July 1
• Ozawa Tourism Public Restroom (1128-1 Shimomena, Hanno): Reopens July 1
• Kawamata Tourism Public Restroom (558-1 Shimomena, Hanno): Reopens July 1
• Nakai Tourism Public Restroom (219 Nakai, Hanno): Reopens July 13
• Hanno Tourist Information Center Tourism Public Restroom (1051-8 Hanno, Hanno): Preparations underway for reopening

Reopening dates will be updated as needed.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/kanko/13714.html
